---
title: "Reproducible Research: Peer Assessment 1"
output: 
  html_document:
    keep_md: true
---

## load Libraries
```{r packages, echo=TRUE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

## load data

```{r loaddata, echo=TRUE}

  activity_data <- read.csv("activity.csv") 

  activity_data$date <- as.Date(activity_data$date)
  
                        print(head(activity_data))
                        
  activity <- activity_data %>% na.omit() %>%
                          group_by(date) %>%
                          summarize(daily_steps = sum(steps))
                        print(head(activity))
                                                
```

## Histogram


```{r hist}
ggplot(data = activity, aes(x = daily_steps)) + geom_histogram(binwidth = 1000)

```


## What is mean total number of steps taken per day?

```{r meanactivity, echo=TRUE}

  paste0("mean total number of steps taken per day =  ", mean(activity$daily_steps))

```
## What is the average daily activity pattern?

```{r averageplot}

ggplot(data = activity, aes(date, daily_steps)) + geom_line(color = "#00AFBB", size = 2)

```


## Imputing missing values

```{r NAValues}
sum(is.na(activity_data))

```

## Are there differences in activity patterns between weekdays and weekends?
